title: symplocos alstonia
intro: Symplocos alstonia, also known as the Indian alstonia or black alstonia, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia, belonging to the family Symplocaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Symplocos alstonia include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
